name: Running Man Philippines
overview: The Filipino version of “Running Man” has successfully captured the essence of the original while adding its own cultural twists. This adaptation brings together famous Filipino celebrities who take on similar challenges, providing a local flavour that resonates with the audience. The show's format includes a mix of physical and mental challenges, keeping viewers on the edge of their seats.

trailers.title: Running Man Philippines: Cast reveal on May 27!  I Teaser
